summary: Controller review allows HARBOR-241 at the current head. Opening or reusing an interactive managed session for control_owner=user now establishes the existing user-held predicate; closed and released sessions still clear it. Manual-authentication completion remains supervisor-authorized and still requires active canonical identity/profile/execution bindings before the redacted public identity state can change. No automatic login, credential or Cookie material, site task, or external write is introduced.
reviewed_validation_summary: 2026-07-10T10:32Z on `work/harbor-241-live-auth-sync`: `pnpm install --offline --frozen-lockfile`, `pnpm typecheck`, focused manual-authentication test (43 passed), and `git diff --check` passed. Full `pnpm test` observed two concurrent local-provider timing failures; the isolated persistent-profile and stale-DevTools-port regressions both passed. A real local official-Chrome Xiaohongshu session was active with user control, but its confirmation failed because direct user session open/reuse did not mark the interactive session user-held.
follow_ups: After merge, rebuild the packaged App and verify user-confirmed public identity synchronization against the active local managed session.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: Controller-authored implementation review found no P0-P2 authorization, identity-binding, persistence, or public-data-boundary defects.
